scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build --workspace=frontend && LANG=en_US.UTF-8 LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 npm exec --workspace=frontend -- cap sync
scripts.cap:ios: npm run cap:sync && npm exec --workspace=frontend -- cap open ios
scripts.cap:android: npm run cap:sync && npm exec --workspace=frontend -- cap open android
